node.text:
Amazing places to eat authentic Japan food at in Tokyo, Japan 😋🎌

📍Places mentioned:

1. Penny Lane
1F, 1 Chome-1-2 Oshiage, Sumida City, Tokyo 131-0045

2. Pelican Café
111-0042 Tokyo, Taito City, Kotobuki, 3 Chome−9−11 1階

3. Himawari Sandwich
124-0024 Tokyo, Katsushika City, Shinkoiwa, 1 Chome−41−8 一乃亥ビル 1F

4. Chaya Tabanenoshi
2 Chome-7-7 Asakusa, Taito City, Tokyo 111-0032

5. Sushi Hatsume
150-0013 Tokyo, Shibuya, Ebisu, 1 Chome−25−11 1F

6. Damena Rinjin Ningyōchō
103-0013 Tokyo, Chuo City, Nihonbashiningyocho, 3 Chome−7−13

7. Kirimugiya Jinroku
160-0022 Tokyo, Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 1 Chome−17−1 LAND・DEN1F

8. Benitsuru Pancake
2 Chome-1-11 Nishiasakusa, Taito City, Tokyo 111-0035

Save this for your next food trip 🤩

Shoutout to @foodtokyotourguide for these delicious recommendations
We went there! Food is good, they have a huge selection and it’s super cool inside!
Pelican cafe has the best ham katsu sando for sure!
